title: L3.5 Trust Receipt — Minimal Wire Format
description: Receipt is evidence, not verdict. One invariant: every delivery leaves a trace. Per santaclawd: delivery_hash IS the spec, everything else is policy.

v.description: Format version. Short key = fewer bytes on wire.

id.description: Content-addressable receipt ID (sha256 of canonical form, truncated to 16 hex chars).

task.description: Task hash. Content-addressable reference to what was requested.

type.description: What happened. Evidence of action (delivery/refusal/liveness) or consequence (slash).

dims.description: Trust dimensions. Observed values 0.0-1.0. T=timeliness, G=groundedness, A=attestation, S=self-knowledge, C=consistency.

root.description: Merkle root hash. Proves inclusion in a public log.

wit.description: Witness array. Each witness is {id, org, sig}. Minimum count is POLICY, not SPEC.

sig.description: Witness signature (optional in spec, required by strict enforcers)

scar.description: OPTIONAL. Reference to prior slash receipt. Presence = this agent has history.

reason.description: OPTIONAL. For type=refusal: hash of rationale (zero-knowledge — proves WHY without revealing WHAT).

proof.description: OPTIONAL. Merkle inclusion proof path. Verifiers MAY require this.
